context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements Hydrogen's cart system using CartForm, CartForm.getFormInput, CartForm.ACTIONS enum, and server-side cookie-based cart ID storage rather than client-side state.

checklist.name: CartForm import from hydrogen
checklist.description: Imports `CartForm` from '@shopify/hydrogen' (not from a custom implementation or other package)

checklist.name: ActionFunctionArgs from remix-oxygen
checklist.description: Imports `ActionFunctionArgs` from '@shopify/remix-oxygen' in the cart route action function

checklist.name: CartForm.getFormInput usage
checklist.description: Uses `CartForm.getFormInput(formData)` to extract `action` and `inputs` from the form data in the action function

checklist.name: cart.setCartId in response headers
checklist.description: Calls `cart.setCartId(result.cart.id)` and includes the returned headers in the JSON response

checklist.name: No client-side cart state
checklist.description: Does NOT store cart ID or cart data in React state (useState), localStorage, or sessionStorage — cart state is managed server-side only

checklist.name: CartForm component in AddToCartButton
checklist.description: AddToCartButton component uses the `<CartForm>` component with `route='/cart'` and `action={CartForm.ACTIONS.LinesAdd}`

checklist.name: Correct lines input structure
checklist.description: The CartForm inputs for adding lines uses `{ lines: [{ merchandiseId: variantId, quantity: 1 }] }` structure
